claims.claim: The Rabbinate marriage registration fee in 2026 is approximately 824 NIS (730-844 NIS depending on city).
claims.raw_snippet: Full Fee: 824 NIS. Discounted Fee: 430 NIS (40% reduction). Cross-referenced with Tzohar (March 2026): 844 NIS standard / 506 NIS discounted; Jerusalem Religious Council: 730 NIS; Nahariya: 824 NIS.

claims.claim: 40% discount on Rabbinate registration fee for olim (within 2 years), IDF/national service, students under 30, persons with disabilities, blind or visually impaired.
claims.raw_snippet: Couples registering for marriage at rabbinate offices may receive a 40% discount on registration fees if one spouse belongs to an eligible population group (military, national service, disability, students under 30, yeshiva students under 30, new immigrants in first two years, blind/visually impaired).

claims.claim: ACUM family-event music license fee in 2026 is 395.30 NIS including VAT, must be paid at least 72 hours before the event.
claims.raw_snippet: The current 2026 fee for a family event music license (such as a wedding) is 395.30 NIS, inclusive of VAT. The license must be arranged up to 72 hours before the event date and covers public performance of protected musical works from ACUM's repertoire at a single family event.

claims.claim: Tik nisuin (marriage file) must be opened 21-90 days before the wedding.
claims.raw_snippet: You must open a marriage file (tik nissuin) at your local religious council anytime between 90 and 21 days before the wedding.

claims.claim: Average Israeli wedding cost in 2026: 120,000 NIS in the south up to 250,000 NIS in central Israel for 400-650 guests.
claims.raw_snippet: חתונה ממוצעת בשנת 2026 תעלה בין 120,000 שקל בדרום הארץ (עד 400 מוזמנים) ותגיע לסכומים של 250,000 שקל במרכז הארץ (עד 650 מוזמנים).

claims.claim: Standard per-plate cost in Israel in 2026 is 280-320 NIS, range 250-350 NIS; January weekday hall ~180 NIS, June Thursday at same hall ~290 NIS.
claims.raw_snippet: מחיר מנה ממוצעת בחתונה סטנדרטית עומד על 280-320 שקל. במרכז 290-500 שקל, בדרום/צפון 150-240 שקל. זוג באולם סטנדרטי בינואר ביום שלישי משלם כ-180 שקל למנה; אותו אולם באותו תפריט ביוני בחמישי דורש 290 שקל למנה.

claims.claim: Wedding photographer + video packages in Israel 2026: basic 5,000-7,000 NIS, photo+video 7,000-10,000 NIS, full package 10,000-15,000 NIS.
claims.raw_snippet: Basic photography: 5,000-7,000 NIS; Photography with video: 7,000-10,000 NIS; Full package: 10,000-15,000 NIS. Range overall 3,500-18,000 NIS.

claims.claim: Cyprus civil marriages are recognized by Israel via Misrad HaPnim registration after apostille + notarized Hebrew translation.
claims.raw_snippet: Israel recognizes civil marriages performed outside its borders. Cyprus marriages receive full legal recognition once the apostilled marriage certificate is presented at Misrad HaPnim with notarized Hebrew translation. 2026 update: Cypriot municipalities require separate per-partner files and reject extracts printed from kiosk machines.

claims.claim: Civil marriages performed online by Utah County officiants (Zoom) are recognized by Israeli courts, ruling upheld by Supreme Court on 7 March 2023.
claims.raw_snippet: In September 2022, an Israeli court in Lod recognized civil and religious marriages solemnized on Zoom by officiants in Utah as legal; the ruling was upheld by the Supreme Court of Israel on 7 March 2023. By 2024, Hiddush estimated over 3,000 Israeli couples had married via Utah teleconference.

claims.claim: Sefirat HaOmer 2026 runs from April 2 to May 20; Lag BaOmer is May 5. Ashkenazi custom usually permits weddings from Lag BaOmer; Sephardi custom from Lag BaOmer + 1.
claims.raw_snippet: ספירת העומר בשנת 2026 חלה בין יום חמישי, 2 באפריל ועד ליום ראשון, 20 במאי. ל"ג בעומר חל ב-5 במאי (יום שלישי). אצל ספרדים מותר מל"ד בעומר; אצל אשכנזים בד"כ מל"ג בעומר ואילך.

claims.claim: Three Weeks period in 2026: 17 Tammuz (July 2) to 9 Av/Tisha B'Av (July 23). No weddings during this period in standard practice.
claims.raw_snippet: Days on which no weddings are conducted include the Three Weeks period from 17 Tammuz to 9 Av. In 2026 this runs July 2 to July 23.
